title: triticum compactum var. erinaceum
intro: Triticum compactum var. erinaceum, also known as spiny wheat or prickly wheat, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Triticum compactum var. erinaceum include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Triticum compactum var. erinaceum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
